title: Daily Info
content:
Welcome to My PHP application!

This application demonstrates a modern web interface built with Vue 3 and Bun.

Features include:

  • Fixed header with search functionality
  • Adjustable sidebar navigation
  • Scrollable content with HTML support

title: Daily Info
content:
• Santa's Calendar; Santa's Calendar 2025
  • Greenfield Event Calendar
  • Expensis YTD - Nov 13 2023

title: Technical Architecture
content:
The application architecture is built with modern web technologies:

Frontend Stack:
  - Vue 3 (Composition API)
  - Vite (Build tool)
  - CSS3 (Styling)
  - JavaScript ES6+

The sidebar width is adjustable by dragging the resize handle on the right edge.

Search functionality works across both section titles and content, providing instant filtering.

title: Usage Instructions
content:
Here are the key interactions:

  1. Search: Type in the search field at the top to filter content
  2. Navigate: Click on any item in the sidebar to scroll to that section
  3. Resize: Drag the right edge of the sidebar to adjust its width
  4. Read: Enjoy rich HTML-formatted content in the main panel

The content is loaded from an external JSON file, making it easy to update and maintain.

title: Styling & Customization
content:
The application features a modern design with:

  • Gradient header with purple theme
  • Smooth transitions and hover effects
  • Custom scrollbar styling
  • Responsive typography
  • Accessible color contrast ratios

All styles are scoped to components, preventing CSS conflicts.

You can customize colors, fonts, and spacing by modifying the component styles.
